steps.title: Set the function equal to 35
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=7\sqrt{x}$, and the question asks when $f(x)=35$. So solve $$7\sqrt{x}=35$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The correct answer is $25$, which is Choice C. It checks because $7\sqrt{25}=7(5)=35$. The other choices do not make the function equal $35$.
